name: Sears, Roebuck and Co.
description: Sears, Roebuck and Co., commonly known as Sears, is an American chain of department stores and an online retailer. Founded in 1892 by Richard Warren Sears and Alvah Curtis Roebuck, the company grew to become the largest retailer in the United States during the 20th century. It played a pivotal role in American commerce through its iconic mail-order catalogs and vast network of brick-and-mortar stores. Following a 2005 merger with Kmart, the company became part of Sears Holdings, though it has since undergone significant restructuring and downsizing in the modern retail landscape.
